title: API Developer Portal
description: Enterprise API portal built with React, Next.js, TypeScript, GraphQL, authentication, observability, and CI/CD pipelines. Supporting enterprise API platforms with shared modules including GraphQL server and clients.

title: API Provider Portal
description: Provider-facing portal for API management with server-side API routes and OAuth/OIDC integration. Enables secure server-side access to enterprise product catalogs.

title: API Consumer Portal
description: Consumer portal for API documentation and access with product metadata and version specifications. Developed server-side API route handlers in Next.js to fetch and manage product metadata.

title: UI Component Library
description: Reusable React component library standardizing UI, theming, and development practices across multiple applications. Built and scaled to support enterprise-grade applications.

title: Company Showcase Products
description: Product showcase website with contact forms for communication with POs and PMs. Features relevant product information and streamlined communication channels.

title: Technology Radar
description: Technology tracking and visualization platform for emerging technology assessment. Helps teams evaluate and adopt new technologies strategically.
